content.text:
Contoso offers a product called the "Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses," which belong to the smart eyewear category. These glasses feature:

- Augmented Reality (AR) interface
- A voice-controlled AI agent
- HD video recording with 3D audio
- UV protection and blue light filtering
- Wireless charging with extended battery life

They come with a two-year limited warranty on electronic components and a 30-day no-questions-asked return policy.
